_class.summary: Provides access to the game's world law system.
remarks: Changes to properties immediately propagate to the underlying game engine state, so external caching or copying is generally unnecessary.

world_law_evolution_events.summary: Allows monoliths to evolve and mutate nearby creatures.

world_law_civ_limit_population_100.summary: Limits the maximum population in settlements to 100 inhabitants.

world_law_gaias_covenant.summary: Prevents environmental destruction from explosions, fires, and disasters.

world_law_diplomacy.summary: Alliances forged, betrayals planned, and wars will erupt.

world_law_rites.summary: Clan members can start rites based on their religion.

world_law_rebellions.summary: Cities can rebel when they have low loyalty. Only works if diplomacy is enabled.

world_law_border_stealing.summary: Rulers can steal the borders of other cities.

world_law_glitched_noosphere.summary: Religions, languages and cultures go off the rails with random traits.

world_law_terramorphing.summary: Structures spread their species' natural biome over time.

world_law_kingdom_expansion.summary: Kingdoms will send settlers to establish new villagers.

world_law_angry_civilians.summary: Villagers will also participate in same-race wars.

world_law_civ_babies.summary: Children will be born in villages.

world_law_civ_migrants.summary: Unreasonably attractive migrants may appear near bonfires when the population drops.

world_law_gene_spaghetti.summary: New subspecies are born with a tangled mess of random genes.

world_law_mutant_box.summary: New subspecies are created with a mix of random traits.

world_law_old_age.summary: Creatures can die from old age.

world_law_peaceful_monsters.summary: Animals and other creatures will not attack anyone.

world_law_forever_tumor_creep.summary: Creep tiles like tumor, pumpkin, biomass, etc — will stay even after the base structure is gone.

world_law_drop_of_thoughts.summary: Sapient beings now fall gently via the Clouds of Life.

world_law_animals_spawn.summary: Animals can randomly appear in your world.

world_law_clouds.summary: Clouds carry pollen, spores and aeroplankton, seeding life across the land.

world_law_spread_density_high.summary: The world is densely packed with trees, plants and fungi.

world_law_vegetation_random_seeds.summary: Trees and plants will appear randomly in biomes.

world_law_roots_without_borders.summary: Plants and trees can spread in any biome.

world_law_grow_minerals.summary: Minerals will spawn in biomes randomly from the underground.

world_law_erosion.summary: Tiles have a chance to turn into sand when near water.

world_law_spread_trees.summary: Allow trees to naturally grow and spread.

world_law_spread_fast_trees.summary: Trees grow and spread at increased speeds.

world_law_entanglewood.summary: Trees reduce the movement speed of nearby creatures.

world_law_bark_bites_back.summary: Trees have a chance to retaliate when damaged.

world_law_spread_plants.summary: Allow plants to naturally grow and spread.

world_law_spread_fast_plants.summary: Plants multiply and expand at maximum speed.

world_law_plants_tickles.summary: Plants will irritate or distract nearby creatures.

world_law_nectar_nap.summary: Flowers release sleep-inducing pollen when disturbed.

world_law_spread_fungi.summary: Allow fungal growth in this world.

world_law_spread_fast_fungi.summary: Fungi grow at an incredible rate.

world_law_biome_overgrowth.summary: Biomes will try to overgrow other biomes.

world_law_forever_lava.summary: Lava stays forever and does not cool off into rock.

world_law_forever_cold.summary: Ice and snow stay forever and do not melt.

world_law_disasters_nature.summary: Natural disasters will happen randomly from time to time.

world_law_disasters_other.summary: Invasions and other fun stuff may happen randomly from time to time.

world_law_rat_plague.summary: A swarm of rats can spark a devastating plague.
